name: Unique Veterinary Prescription Diet Mini Small Breed Adult Dog Gastro Intestinal Chicken & Rice 1.5kg
shortDescription: It is used in the process of relieving acute and chronic intestinal syndrome and absorption problems and curing diarrhea. It helps in the treatment of stomach problems. It ensures the health of skin and feathers. Due to its beneficial content for the digestive system microbiota, it helps dogs with acute or chronic digestive system problems to regain their health. Thanks to its rich and delicious content and nutritional supplements, it meets all the needs of your dog.
description: How it works: Content rich in probiotics and prebiotics, Quality and hydrolyzed protein source, Blueberry (antioxidant and fiber source), Rich fiber content (healthy digestion), Wild sea buckthorn (Omega-7 and anti-inflammatory), Digestive system microbiota useful content. Ingredients: Chicken Protein, Brown Rice, Pea, Hydrolyzed Chicken Protein, Sugar Beet Pulp, Chicken Fat, Corn Gluten Meal, Dried Egg, Anchovy Oil, Brewer's Yeast, Vitamin and Mineral Premix, Natural Flavors, Probiotic, Psyllium Shells, Blueberry, Dried Algae, MOS, ?-Glucan, Tocopherol, Yucca, Wild Seaweed. Amyloliquefaciens) 7 x 10 14 /kg
